ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula: AND( ISBLANK(Primary_Context_Object__c), OR( ISPICKVAL(Submission_Storage__c, "Primary_Object"), ISPICKVAL(Submission_Storage__c, "Both"), AND( ISBLANK(TEXT(Submission_Storage__c)), NOT(ISPICKVAL(Form_Type__c, "Survey")) ) ) )
ValidationRule.errorMessage: Primary Context Object is required for Forms or when Submission Storage is Primary Object or Both
